notes: Alfred Linux 7.77 — sovereign desktop from Debian Trixie with Linux kernel.org 7.0.1 tree, Omahon Seal, and the full Alfred hook stack. AKJV (Authorized King Jesus Version) Bible data ships under /usr/share/alfred/bible/ with the image (not in vmlinux). Groq pip SDK for GroqCloud; model IDs per console.groq.com. First-boot TTS/he zenity per README.
